caption: Step 1: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
description: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
narration: Alright hustlers and founders, stop crying over broken spreadsheets! Today, we are generating a pristine, professional GST invoice using Zoho Invoice.

caption: Step 2: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
description: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
narration: The best part? It's free and needs zero logins. No passwords to forget today. Fire up the free generator page and let's get this bread.
fallback_narration: Jump into the free generator. No login needed.

caption: Step 3: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
description: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
narration: Boom, we're in. First up, who's getting paid? We are. Type in your company name, TechStar Solutions, your name, and address.

caption: Step 4: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
description: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
narration: Time to bill the big fish. Enter the client details: Acme Corp International. Drop in their address and lock in the billing state, because the taxman is always watching.
fallback_narration: Now fill in the client details.

caption: Step 5: Set invoice number to INV-2026-001
narration: Set that invoice number to INV-2026-001. The first invoice is always the sweetest.

caption: Step 6: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
description: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
narration: Now for the fun part. Line item one: Web Development Services. Forty units at twenty-five hundred a pop. Don't forget the 9 percent GST.

caption: Step 7: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
description: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
narration: Line item two: UI/UX Design, twenty units at three thousand.

caption: Step 8: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
description: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
narration: One more for the road! Line item three: Annual Server Hosting. Eighteen thousand flat.

caption: Step 9: Add payment notes and terms for the client
description: Add payment notes and terms for the client
narration: Almost home. Drop your payment terms in the notes: payment due within 30 days. Add your bank details so the money actually finds its way to you.
fallback_narration: Add the payment terms and bank details.

caption: Step 10: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
description: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
narration: Final sanity check. Subtotal, GST, grand total looking absolutely crispy.

caption: Step 11: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
description: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
narration: Hit that Download button, grab your PDF, and boom!
fallback_narration: Download the invoice as a PDF.

caption: Step 12: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
description: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
narration: Flawless GST invoice in under two minutes. Now go get your money!
fallback_narration: And that's a clean Zoho invoice, done.
